2605.27195.title: EpiCurveBench: Evaluating VLMs on Epidemic Curve Digitization
2605.27195.paper_summary: Chart-to-data extraction with vision-language models (VLMs) is increasingly evaluated on benchmarks that show diminishing headroom (frontier VLMs exceed 89% on ChartQA) and with metrics that treat extracted points as unordered key-value pairs, ignoring the temporal structure of time series and penalizing small alignment shifts as catastrophic failures. We address both gaps with EpiCurveBench, a benchmark of 1,000 real-world epidemic curve images curated from diverse public-health sources, and EpiCurveSimilarity (ECS), an evaluation metric that aligns predicted and ground-truth series via dynamic programming, tolerating local temporal shifts and gaps while penalizing them proportionally. Evaluating six methods--three frontier closed VLMs, one open VLM, and two specialized chart-extraction systems--we find the strongest model reaches only 52.3% ECS, and that ECS spreads the four general-purpose VLMs over a 25-point range where key-value metrics (RMS, SCRM) compress them into a 5-point band. We further validate ECS against four downstream epidemiological summary statistics, finding that higher ECS predicts smaller errors in total counts, peak timing, and peak magnitude, and higher growth-rate fidelity; across all four, ECS correlates 1.5--3.6 times more strongly than Dynamic Time Warping, which lacks a gap penalty and therefore cannot distinguish a truncated prediction from a temporally faithful one. EpiCurveBench targets a high-impact public-health application--unlocking decades of outbreak data trapped in published figures--but the benchmark and metric apply directly to any structured time-series chart-extraction setting.
2605.27195.paper_summary_zh: 圖表到數據的提取使用視覺-語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地在顯示減少空間的基準上進行評估（前沿 VLMs 在 ChartQA 上超過 89%），並且使用的指標將提取的點視為無序的鍵值對，忽略了時間序列的時間結構，並將小的對齊偏移懲罰為災難性失敗。我們通過 EpiCurveBench 解決了這兩個問題，這是一個由來自多種公共衛生來源的 1,000 張真實世界流行病曲線圖像組成的基準，以及 EpiCurveSimilarity（ECS），這是一種通過動態規劃對預測和真實序列進行對齊的評估指標，能夠容忍局部時間偏移和間隙，同時按比例懲罰它們。我們評估了六種方法——三種前沿封閉 VLMs、一種開放 VLM 和兩種專門的圖表提取系統——發現最強的模型僅達到 52.3% 的 ECS，而 ECS 將四種通用 VLMs 分佈在 25 點範圍內，而鍵值指標（RMS，SCRM）則將它們壓縮到 5 點帶內。我們進一步將 ECS 與四個下游流行病學摘要統計進行驗證，發現較高的 ECS 預測總計數、峰值時間和峰值幅度的較小誤差，以及較高的增長率忠實度；在所有四個指標中，ECS 的相關性是動態時間扭曲的 1.5 到 3.6 倍，後者缺乏間隙懲罰，因此無法區分被截斷的預測和時間上忠實的預測。EpiCurveBench 針對一個高影響力的公共衛生應用——解鎖被困在已發表數據中的數十年的疫情數據——但該基準和指標可以直接應用於任何結構化時間序列圖表提取設置。
2605.27195.author: Thomas Berkane et.al.
